title: Finding Item
description: Canonical finding-item schema for AgentOps validation skills. A compatible subset of the finding-artifact schema (docs/contracts/finding-artifact.schema.json). Any valid finding item is also a valid verdict.json finding entry.

id.description: Finding identifier for cross-skill correlation (e.g., f-2026-03-12-001). Maps to finding-artifact.id.

category.description: Finding classification (e.g., security, architecture, performance, style).

description.description: What was found. Maps to finding-artifact.summary.

recommendation.description: How to address the finding. Maps to finding-artifact.checklist_item.

fix.description: Specific action to resolve this finding.

ref.description: File path, spec anchor, or doc reference. Maps to finding-artifact.source_artifact.
